strengths: Long tenure with TypeScript/Node.js across multiple companies aligns with the primary stack
Founder experience with GISCollective demonstrates end-to-end full-stack delivery on Node.js
Current role at re:cinq involves AI-agent infrastructure and MCP tooling, matching the AI agent requirement
concerns: No demonstrated production experience with Nest.js, Vitest, or React at meaningful depth — React appears only briefly at Optilyz with no detail, and Nest.js/Vitest are absent from the resume

Heavy reliance on DLang across many roles (Sociomantic, Altom, GISCollective, NI) suggests stack drift away from the JVM/TypeScript ecosystem the role centers on; Kotlin is entirely absent and Java exposure is dated (2016–2018)

Cloud and containerization evidence is thin — only AWS CDK mentioned once at Optilyz, no GCP/Azure, and Kubernetes appears only in a self-managed open-source side project rather than enterprise production

key_factors.factor: No Kotlin and dated Java exposure

response.justification: The candidate has long full-stack tenure and current AI-agent exposure, but the resume shows little to no evidence of the role's primary frameworks (Nest.js, Vitest) or its secondary JVM stack (Kotlin, modern Java). React appears only in passing, cloud/Kubernetes experience is largely confined to a personal project, and a substantial portion of the career is invested in DLang — a stack with no overlap with this role. On the specific technical surface this position requires, the fit looks weak.
